2606.13643.title: Recursive Agent Harnesses
2606.13643.paper_summary: Recursive language models (RLMs) showed that recursion over model calls is an effective strategy for long-context reasoning, and production coding agents have begun to write code that spawns subagents at scale, most recently in Anthropic's dynamic workflows. We name and study the pattern between these two lines of work, where the recursive unit is a full agent harness with filesystem tools, code execution, and planning rather than a model call with no tools. We call this the Recursive Agent Harness (RAH) and frame it as harness recursion, the code-first extension to the model recursion of RLMs. A parent agent generates and runs an executable script that spawns subagent harnesses in parallel for fine-grained workloads and uses structured function calls for small subtasks. We provide a controlled evaluation on long-context reasoning. With the backbone held fixed at GPT-5 to match the published Codex and RLM baselines, RAH improves the Codex coding-agent baseline from 71.75% to 81.36% on Oolong-Synthetic (199 samples, 13 context-length buckets up to 4M tokens), a gain attributable to the harness rather than the model. With a stronger backbone, Claude Sonnet 4.5, the same design reaches 89.77%.
2606.13643.paper_summary_zh: 遞歸語言模型（RLMs）顯示，對模型調用的遞歸是一種有效的長上下文推理策略，而生產編碼代理已經開始撰寫代碼，以大規模生成子代理，最近在Anthropic的動態工作流程中尤為明顯。我們命名並研究這兩個工作線之間的模式，其中遞歸單元是一個完整的代理工具組，具備檔案系統工具、代碼執行和計劃，而不是一個沒有工具的模型調用。我們稱這為遞歸代理工具組（RAH），並將其框架設置為工具組遞歸，這是對RLMs模型遞歸的代碼優先擴展。一個父代理生成並運行一個可執行腳本，並為細粒度工作負載並行生成子代理工具組，並對小子任務使用結構化函數調用。我們提供了對長上下文推理的受控評估。在固定的GPT-5骨幹下，以匹配已發表的Codex和RLM基準，RAH將Codex編碼代理基準從71.75%提高到81.36%在Oolong-Synthetic（199個樣本，13個上下文長度桶，最多4M個標記），這一增益歸因於工具組而非模型。在更強大的骨幹Claude Sonnet 4.5下，相同的設計達到了89.77%。
2606.13643.author: Elias Lumer et.al.
2606.13643.authors: Elias Lumer, Sahil Sen, Kevin Paul, Vamse Kumar Subbiah
